items.title: Agentic Marketing Org Design — activate business stream marketing agent
items.note: Activate marketing agent for AInchors own marketing. CHG-0369 Sprint 4 commitment.

items.title: Three Work Types Rule — enforce script/governance/LLM separation
items.note: Quick win. Defines when work routes to script vs governance agent vs LLM.

items.title: Sources of Truth Register — 10 core data types
items.note: Canonical storage location for each data domain. Foundation for Phase 1.

items.title: JSON to Postgres Migration — Top 5 State Files
items.note: Migrate 5 most-critical JSON state files to Postgres. Was Sprint 6 → pulled forward.

items.title: Explicit state checking pattern — Thrawn platform rule
items.note: Codify state-check-before-act pattern across all agents. CHG-0369.

items.title: OWL Drift Detection and Prevention System
items.note: 5 stories: compliance tracking, drift alerts, runbook procedure, audit script, agent training. Added CHG-0366.

notes: Restored from CHG-0369 (8 items) + CHG-0366 (TKT-0228 added). sprint-current.json was overwritten at 14:28 AEST on 2026-05-17, losing the 8-item scope. Restored 2026-05-18 12:00 AEST per Ken directive.
